essays:
```latex
\text{MATRIX MULTIPLICATION:} \\
[1 \quad 2] \quad [5 \quad 6] \quad [19 \quad 22] \\
[3 \quad 4] \times [7 \quad 8] = [43 \quad 50] \\
\text{Each value is a row from A dotted with a column from B, so the top-} \\
\text{right entry is } 1 * 6 + 2 * 8 = 22 \text{ and the bottom-left is } 3 * 5 + 4 * 7 = 43.
```

```latex
\text{CONVOLUTION (FILTER APPLIED TO IMAGE PATCH):} \\
[1 \ 0] \ [4 \ 5] \\
[0 \ -1] * [6 \ 7] = -3 \\
\text{MULTIPLYING MATCHING POSITIONS AND SUMMING GIVES } 1*4 + 0*5 + 0*6 + \\
-1*7, \text{ WHICH WORKS OUT TO } -3.
```

\# \text{BUILDS MULTIPLICATION TABEL} \\
\text{DEF MULTIPLICATION\_TABLE(N):} \\
\text{    TABLE = []} \\
\text{    FOR I IN RANGE(1, N + 1):} \\
\text{        ROW = []} \\
\text{        FOR J IN RANGE(1, N):}
